name: coding
description: General code writing tools including quality checks, testing, architecture, and implementation support

hooks.command: b="$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/../../essential/*/bin 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n1)"; [ -n "$b" ] || exit 0; exec "$b/emit-context" SessionStart "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/CLAUDE.md"
b="$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/../../essential/*/bin 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n1)"; [ -n "$b" ] || exit 0; exec "$b/emit-context" SubagentStart "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/CLAUDE.md"
